basic_details.short_information: Himachal Pradesh Public Service Commission (HPPSC) Physiotherapist Notification 2026 has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the HPPSC Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Age Limit: 45 years and below Age of a candidate shall be reckoned as on 01-01-2026.

qualification.details: Should be 10 +2 with Medical Science from a recognized University/Board. Should also possess diploma in Physiotherapy from Himachal Pradesh University or an institution recognized by the State Government. OR Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) from Himachal Pradesh University or an institution duly recognized by the State Government. Should be registered with HP Para Medical Council.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HPPSC Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026.
Apply online only through the HPPSC website: http://www.hppsc.hp.gov.in/hppsc.
Click "Apply Online" → "One Time Registration (OTR) for Examinations".
Register as a new user (if not already registered) and create your profile.
Log in to your OTR account and select the relevant advertisement/post.
Upload all required documents, along with your latest photograph and signature.
Before submitting, confirm that all uploaded documents are clear, readable, and genuine.
Review all details carefully because no corrections/modifications are allowed after submission (except category change as per applicable rules).
Submit the application only after ensuring all information is correct.
Applications without a scanned photograph or signature will be rejected.

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Physiotherapist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the HPPSC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download HPPSC Physiotherapist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Should be 10 +2 with Medical Science from a recognized University/Board. Should also possess diploma in Physiotherapy from Himachal Pradesh University or an institution recognized by the State Government. OR Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) from Himachal Pradesh University or an institution duly recognized by the State Government. Should be registered with HP Para Medical Council.

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age Limit: 45 years and below Age of a candidate shall be reckoned as on 01-01-2026.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HPPSC Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HPPSC Physiotherapist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the HPPSC Physiotherapist posts is 06 July 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Physiotherapist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Physiotherapist position by the Himachal Pradesh Public Service Commission (HPPSC) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Physiotherapist post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Physiotherapist post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 23000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the HPPSC Physiotherapist recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this HPPSC Physiotherapist recruitment is 3-63/2023-PSC (R-I). Please refer to this number for any specific queries or while filling out the application.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the Physiotherapist position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Physiotherapist post is on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as per the terms and conditions of the commission.

faq.question: Q7. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment drive is being conducted by the Himachal Pradesh Public Service Commission (HPPSC), a government body responsible for recruitment in Himachal Pradesh.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of HPPSC?
faq.answer: The official website of the Himachal Pradesh Public Service Commission (HPPSC) is www.hppsc.hp.gov.in/hppsc. You can visit this site for more information and updates.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific qualifications required for the Physiotherapist post?
faq.answer: The specific educational qualifications required for the Physiotherapist post are detailed in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the notification for complete eligibility criteria.
